violations.text: Observed the doors to the outside, located in the retail area and cafe area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Observed purse stored on prep table during food preparation. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. PIC relocated purse to designated area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The hand-washing sink in the cafe area was blocked by a rolling rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Employee voluntarily disposed of ice and removed ice machine from service. Ice machine is not to be used until fully washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
Apples were observed in retail area kept in a manner that does not protect from contamination by consumers. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The faucet handles of the hand wash sink near the, 'shakes and smoothies' machine were not adequately adjusted and did not allow for the water to be turned on 2) The left faucet handle at the hand wash sink in the ware-washing area did not allow for adequate water to be dispensed New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the bottom multiple pieces of equipment in the prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC stated area near wood will be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
